## Problem

What limitation or frustration motivates this request? Who is affected and how?

## Proposed solution

What the desired behavior or API would look like. Be as concrete as possible.

# Example of the proposed API

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you have evaluated and why you prefer the proposed solution.

## Additional context

Examples, references, related issues, or prior art.
